rationale: The Mirror config now flows from `*Config` → `Resolve` → `ResolvedConfig.MirrorConfig()` → `ExecuteBeadWithConfig` → `ExecuteBeadOptions.MirrorCfg` (execute_bead.go:165), and the new behavioral test seeds a real `ExecutionsMirrorConfig`, runs through `ExecuteBeadWithConfig`, and asserts the mirrored bundle plus mirror-index entry exist on disk. The committed diff itself only adds the test (the wiring was already in place at HEAD), but both AC items are satisfied.
